macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Global Equity Markets Decline Amid Geopolitical Tensions and Rising Oil Prices
items.summary: Major global equity markets across the US, Europe, and Asia fell between 2% and 6% during the past week. Brent crude prices rallied roughly 30%, while India VIX jumped more than 40% to near 20, reflecting heightened market uncertainty.

items.title: S&P 500 Tests 5,000 Level Amid Market Volatility
items.summary: The S&P 500 has fallen significantly during the week, testing the psychologically important 5,000 level. Further downside could open possibilities for moves toward 4,800 and 4,600 levels.

items.title: Silver Market Faces Pressure as Dollar Strengthens
items.summary: Silver experienced a difficult week as the US dollar strengthened. The $80 level represents significant support, with potential further declines to $70 if support breaks.

items.title: Indian Markets Face Pressure from FII Outflows and Crude Oil Surge
items.summary: Indian stock markets remain under pressure from continued FII selling, elevated crude oil prices above $92, and geopolitical tensions. Key inflation data releases from the US, India, China, and Europe are expected to influence monetary policy decisions.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: MetaMask's $mUSD Stablecoin Dominates Crypto Development Activity in March 2026
items.summary: MetaMask's new stablecoin $mUSD leads development activity, followed by Chainlink, Hedera, and ICP. AI-crypto projects like NEAR, ICP, and Aptos are gaining traction with recent updates including Hedera's Stripe integration and NEAR's 37% surge.

items.title: Bitcoin Faces $70 Million Liquidation Risk at $54,000 Support Level
items.summary: Bitcoin is under extreme leverage with a potential $70 million liquidation trap at $54,000 amid volatile market conditions and a possible long squeeze. Recent rejection from $74K has pushed prices toward $65-66K.

items.title: DeepSnitch AI Announces March 2026 Presale as Top Crypto Opportunity
items.summary: DeepSnitch AI launches its presale at $0.04313, raising over $1.96 million with AI trading agents set to go live end of March. Positioned as the best presale of 2026 amid Bittensor's Grayscale filing and market reset.

items.title: U.S. Policy Shifts Boost Crypto with Trump Support and SEC Task Force
items.summary: President Trump's support for digital assets and new SEC Crypto Task Force signal a crypto-friendly environment. Eric Trump's comments on capital gains exemptions highlight nine U.S.-based coins like SOL, XRP, and AVAX to watch.

items.title: Pepeto Presale Sells Out Rapidly Amid $225K Bitcoin Price Predictions
items.summary: Pepeto presale gains momentum while analysts predict Bitcoin could reach $225K. The news underscores ongoing hype around new token launches and bullish BTC forecasts.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Valve Recommits to 2026 Launch for Steam Machine Amid Delay Rumors
items.summary: Valve has confirmed it remains on track to launch the Steam Machine in 2026, clarifying earlier statements despite rumors of a delay into 2027 due to the ongoing RAM crisis affecting hardware supply.

items.title: NYT Connections #1002 Features Video Game Theme
items.summary: Today's New York Times Connections puzzle (March 9, #1002) includes a purple category 'They feature a boss' encompassing VIDEO GAME alongside COMPANY, E STREET BAND, and MAFIA.

items.title: Fallout 76 Releases New 'The Backwoods' Update
items.summary: Bethesda launched a free update for Fallout 76 called 'The Backwoods' on March 3, introducing new content like Uninvited Guests in the wasteland.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Marvell Technology Reports Strong Q4 Data-Center Revenue and 1.6T Solutions Bookings
items.summary: Marvell Technology's Q4 data-center revenue reached $1.5B with 40% growth, dispelling fears of losing key customers like Amazon and Microsoft. The company announced strong bookings for cutting-edge 1.6T optical interconnect solutions entering production, with expected rapid revenue ramp in fiscal 2027.[1]

items.title: Northland Power Targets Capacity Doubling by 2030 Amid Electricity Super-Cycle
items.summary: Northland Power's stock has fallen 36% in three years due to debt, dividend cut, and project delays, but offers a 3.38% monthly dividend yield. Key offshore wind projects like Hai Long and Baltic Power are on track for 2027 and 2026 completion, respectively, positioning for doubled capacity.[5]

items.title: Bank of Nova Scotia Highlighted as Cheap Canadian Dividend Stock
items.summary: Bank of Nova Scotia (TSX:BNS) is positioned as an undervalued dividend stock for long-term holding amid market opportunities.[6]
